args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE aas.idShort CONTAINS 'Hall 4' OR aas.idShort CONTAINS 'Hall4'
      OR (el.idShort CONTAINS 'transport' OR el.idShort CONTAINS 'robot' OR el.idShort CONTAINS 'Transport')
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, sm.idShort, el.idShort, labels(el) AS labels
LIMIT 50

tool_calls.result_preview: {"error":"forbidden_pattern","violations":[{"rule":"idShort_contains_or_regex","hint":"Use exact match instead: WHERE aas.idShort = 'ExactName'. See cypher.md anti-pattern #4.","match":"aas.idShort CO

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
      -[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS semanticId
LIMIT 100

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'Hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN sm.idShort, el.idShort, labels(el) AS labels
LIMIT 100

MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(entity:Entity)
      -[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
WHERE entity.idShort IN ['MiR100_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002']
RETURN entity.idShort, asset.globalAssetId, asset.assetKind, asset.assetType

MATCH (sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(parent:Entity)
MATCH (parent)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(child:Entity)
WHERE parent.idShort = 'EntryNode'
MATCH (child)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN child.idShort, asset.globalAssetId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
      -[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0'})
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, sm.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR250_001'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el.idShort IN ['Status', 'Fault', 'Error', 'Alarm']
RETURN sm.idShort, el.idShort, labels(el) AS labels, el.value

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR250_002'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
      -[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, labels(sm)

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR100_001'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
      -[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, labels(sm)

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el.idShort IN ['Fault', 'Error', 'Warning', 'Alarm', 'FaultLight', 'ErrorLight']
      AND aas.idShort IN ['MiR100_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002']
RETURN aas.idShort, sm.idShort, el.idShort, el.value
